_description: Phase 6 go/no-go verdict: AoA optimization sweep across nine eta_c x loss_frac scenarios
_assert_convention: unit_system=SI, F_vert_sign=Phase2 (negative=downward=opposing_buoyancy), lambda_held_constant=0.9, brentq_from_phase5_solver=imported_not_reimplemented, PITFALL-M1=W_pump_uses_W_adia_not_W_iso, PITFALL-N-ACTIVE=N_foil=24_not_30, PITFALL-C6=W_jet_equals_zero_explicit, PITFALL-COROT=P_net_corot_scaled_by_(v_loop/v_nom)^3_at_each_AoA
_units: SI; COP dimensionless; AoA in degrees; J for energies
verdict_detail: NO_GO across all AoA and all nine scenarios. Gap = 0.2904.
scenario_independence_note: argmax_AoA COP is identical for all nine scenarios because COP(AoA, eta_c, loss) = W_gross(AoA) * (1-loss) / (N_total*W_adia/eta_c). The (eta_c, loss_frac) factors are multiplicative scalars; they do not change the argmax over AoA. All nine scenarios yield AoA_optimal = 2.0000 deg.

stall_check.note: Not triggered (NO_GO verdict; backtracking condition not met)

brentq_convergence_check.note: All brentq calls converged (no fallback scan triggered)

limiting_constraint_statement: Even at AoA=0 (C_L=0, maximum v_loop=3.691 m/s, maximum co-rotation benefit), COP = 0.93787 under nominal scenario (eta_c=0.70, loss=0.10). This is the maximum achievable COP from co-rotation savings alone. The AoA sweep maximum COP = 0.94373 occurs at AoA = 2.0000 deg where W_foil contribution adds to W_corot benefit. Neither AoA reduction (to boost v_loop and W_corot) nor AoA increase (to boost W_foil) can reach COP = 1.5. Required compressor efficiency eta_c* = 1.0541 at best loss scenario (loss=0.05), which exceeds the isothermal limit (eta_c=1.0).
eta_c_required_note: Required compressor isentropic efficiency to achieve COP=1.5 at AoA_optimal=2.0000 deg with loss_frac=0.05 (best scenario). eta_c*=1.0541. Since eta_c cannot exceed 1.0 (isothermal limit), this confirms COP=1.5 is not physically achievable.
tack_flip_caveat: CAVEAT (partially quantified): tack-flip mechanism losses are not included in the 5-15% mechanical loss fraction. Each vessel must flip its foil at loop top and bottom. An additional 5% effective loss from tack-flip (applied to the already-net COP_max at AoA_optimal=2.0000 deg) would reduce COP from 0.94373 to 0.89130 (reduction of 0.05243). Prototype measurement remains the highest priority for system feasibility assessment.

forbidden_proxies_rejected.fp-cop-lossless: REJECTED: verdict uses COP_nominal (eta_c=0.70, loss=0.10); COP_lossless=2.204 not reported as metric
forbidden_proxies_rejected.fp-reversed-foil: REJECTED: F_vert is kinematic (lift perpendicular to v_rel, always negative); reversed foil does not change verdict
forbidden_proxies_rejected.fp-single-aoa: REJECTED: verdict covers all nine (eta_c x loss_frac) scenarios and full AoA sweep [1, 15] deg
forbidden_proxies_rejected.fp-fixed-vloop: REJECTED: brentq solved at each AoA; v_loop varies significantly across sweep
forbidden_proxies_rejected.fp-corot-at-vnom: REJECTED: corot_scale = (v_loop_corrected/v_nom)^3 applied at each AoA
